Notes: 16th Annual Dr. Betty Shabazz Tournament Championship Game
CNR wins the Tournament, MVP from CNR #21 Jah-Leah Ellis
All-Tourney Team- #12 Hannah Cambel (CNR), Yeshiva #32 Stephanie Greenberg
MEC #3 Nia Tompkins and Old Westbury #35 Crystal Barnes
